SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class BaseHistoryquote

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.ProposeTransientTransfer
grafioschtrader.entities.BaseHistoryquote
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Historyquote, HistoryquoteLegacy
@MappedSuperclass public abstract class BaseHistoryquote extends ProposeTransientTransfer implements Serializable
Shared base for end-of-day quote records. Holds the price (OHLCV), the trading date, the creation provenance and the owning security/currency-pair reference common to both the live Historyquote table and the HistoryquoteLegacy shadow archive.

Extending ProposeTransientTransfer lets both subclasses participate in the propose-change approval flow: a user without direct edit rights on the parent security produces a ProposeChangeEntity instead of a direct write. The @PropertyAlwaysUpdatable / @PropertyOnlyCreation annotations on the fields below drive the field-level diff used by that flow (DataHelper.getDiffPropertiesOfEntity walks the whole class hierarchy via FieldUtils.getAllFieldsList, so the annotations are honoured even though the fields live in this superclass).

See Also:
